title: PMS 562012 Shape Sorter Ball with 12 Bricks | Multicolor | Pack of 1 Accessory
features: ENGAGING DESIGN: The educational multicolor shape sorter ball features a captivating design with 12 colorful bricks, instantly grabbing the attention of little minds while stimulating cognitive development and spatial reasoning skills in toddlers and preschoolers.

DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made from high-quality, non-toxic materials, this shape sorter ball is designed to withstand hours of enthusiastic play by little hands, ensuring long-lasting fun and educational value for your little one.

SIMPLE TO USE: Children will easily learn to identify, match, and insert the 12 differently shaped bricks into their corresponding slots on the ball, making for a user-friendly introduction to shape recognition and problem-solving for emerging learners.

PERFECT GIFT: Surprise the toddlers and preschoolers in your life with this engaging, educational toy that makes for an ideal gift during birthdays, holidays, or simply as a thoughtful "just because" present.

ENRICHING PLAY EXPERIENCE: The educational multicolor shape sorter ball offers your child valuable problem-solving, shape recognition, and fine motor skills practice in a fun, colorful package—making it an essential addition to any young learner's playtime collection.
description: This shape sorter is easy to carry, lightweight, and decent size is convenient to put into a baby diaper bag.
